tagline: Division I-level athletic training brought to everyday owners through a GM-run model with recurring membership revenue and strong momentum in a $121 billion global fitness market.
description_short: D1 Training operates performance fitness facilities anchored by monthly membership revenue and a General Manager model that keeps the owner out of daily training duties. Across 31 reporting franchisees in 2024, average gross revenue reached $679,601, with a system growing 42% in unit count year over year.
market_intelligence_insight: Global health and fitness club market hit $121 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach $244 billion by 2032 at a 9.3% CAGR; US gym memberships reached an all-time high of 77 million in 2024; personal training is the fastest-growing subsegment at 10% annually.
item_19_headline: 31 franchised facilities open at least one year averaged $679601 in 2024 gross revenue
ongoing_support: field operations support,refresher training,annual conference,franchise advisory council,brand fund marketing,tech platform,class programming templates,certified staff training
